items.title: [Full Smile] Fix appointment reminder bug
items.note: Check CRM board Full Smile group first for overlap before drafting -- needs a quick audit first.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Fix the appointment reminder bug identified in Full Smile's CRM workflow
  • Investigate why automated appointment reminders are not triggering or delivering as configured
  • Check GHL automation triggers, SMS/email delivery settings, and any OpenDental integration points that may affect reminder timing
  • Test the reminder sequence end-to-end after implementing the fix to confirm reminders fire at the correct intervals
  • Document the root cause and resolution for future reference

items.title: [Justice Consumer Law] Fix Zoho lead naming
items.note: Posts as a subitem under the existing JCL Reports item on Ads.

payload.updateBody:
Salam,

  • Fix the Zoho lead campaign naming convention so each incoming lead is tagged with the individual video name that generated it, not a generic campaign label.
  • Why: current naming makes it impossible to tell which specific video is driving contact rate, so the team can't tell which videos to make more of.
  • Feeds directly into the Zoho Voice automation work. Once done, the team will know which videos are worth reshooting.

@Nacer Amrouch

Salam,

  • Budget adjusted to $40/day effective immediately
  • This is a temporary reduction while we work through alignment conversations with the client
  • Previous daily spend was approximately $55; the new cap gives us room to continue performance monitoring at a lower threshold until strategic alignment is confirmed

@Ads Team
